title: Agent Olympics Evidence Bundle
description: Collection of evidence artifacts referenced by a result packet. Each item carries a content reference, content type, optional checksum, redaction status, and a value-free redaction rule when applicable. Redaction rules describe the policy — never the secret value itself.

run_id.description: The run this bundle belongs to.

generated_at.description: When this evidence bundle was generated.

kind.description: Evidence kind: log, command_output, screenshot, transcript_excerpt, file_diff, config_snippet, probe_result, api_response, url, other.

source.description: Where the evidence came from, e.g. 'gateway journal', 'session transcript', 'git diff'.

summary.description: Human-readable summary of what this evidence contains. Must not include secret values.

content_ref.description: Relative path, absolute path, or URL to the full evidence content.

content_type.description: MIME type or format hint, e.g. 'text/plain', 'image/png', 'application/x-yaml'.

checksum.description: Content integrity hash for tamper detection.

redacted.description: True if portions of the original evidence were redacted.

redaction_rule.description: Value-free rule describing what was redacted, e.g. 'tokens in command output', 'credential values from config snippet'. Must not contain the actual secret.

metadata.description: Arbitrary metadata key-value pairs (e.g. log level, source line range, tool name).

redaction_policy.description: Global redaction policy applied to all bundle items.

pattern_description.description: Describe what is redacted without exposing patterns.
